hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path // empty' | { read -r f; [[ -n "$f" && "$f" == *.cs ]] && dotnet format --include "$f" --verbosity quiet 2>/dev/null; :; }

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); if [[ "$cmd" == *'arista-mcp ingest'* || "$cmd" == *'arista-mcp serve'* || "$cmd" == *'arista-mcp reindex'* ]]; then if ! pg_isready -h localhost -p 5434 -U arista -d arista -t 2 >/dev/null 2>&1; then printf '%s\n' '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"postgres not reachable on localhost:5434. Start it: podman-compose -f docker/compose.yaml up -d postgres"}}'; exit 0; fi; fi; printf '%s\n' '{}'

cd "$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo .)" 2>/dev/null; { echo '=== arista-mcp session ==='; echo; echo '# git'; git status --short 2>/dev/null | head -10 || echo '  (not a git repo)'; echo; echo '# containers'; podman ps --filter name=arista-mcp --format 'table {{.Names}}\t{{.Status}}' 2>/dev/null | head -5 || echo '  (podman not running)'; echo; echo '# last ingest'; psql -h localhost -p 5434 -U arista arista -tA -c "SELECT to_char(finished_at,'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') || ' status=' || status || ' docs=' || docs_upserted || ' chunks=' || chunks_upserted FROM ingest_runs ORDER BY started_at DESC LIMIT 1" 2>/dev/null || echo '  (db not ready)'; } 2>&1 | jq -Rs '{systemMessage: .}'
